combined_text: How many ounces in a bottle of wine? "Food & Drink Beer, Wine & Spirits How many ounces in a bottle of wine? Follow 1 answer Answers Relevance Rating Newest Oldest Best Answer: The typical bottle of wine is 750 ml. This is just about a fifth of a gallon and a little more than 25 ounces. .
